00030 #ifndef _KERN_STATTYPES_H_
00031 #define _KERN_STATTYPES_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * Further supporting material for stat(), fstat(), and lstat().
00035  *
00036  * File types for st_mode. (The permissions are the low 12 bits.)
00037  * 
00038  * These are also used, shifted right by those 12 bits, in struct
00039  * dirent in libc, which is why they get their own file.
00040  *
00041  * Non-underscore versions of the names can be gotten from <stat.h>
00042  * (kernel) or <sys/stat.h> (userland).
00043  */
00044 
00045 #define _S_IFMT   070000        /* mask for type of file */
00046 #define _S_IFREG  010000        /* ordinary regular file */
00047 #define _S_IFDIR  020000        /* directory */
00048 #define _S_IFLNK  030000        /* symbolic link */
00049 #define _S_IFIFO  040000        /* pipe or named pipe */
00050 #define _S_IFSOCK 050000        /* socket */
00051 #define _S_IFCHR  060000        /* character device */
00052 #define _S_IFBLK  070000        /* block device */
00053 
00054 
00055 #endif /* _KERN_STATTYPES_H_ */
Generated on Sun Jun 27 22:12:13 2010 for Os/161 by  1.6.1
